title: Virtual DOM Diffing Algorithm
input_format: Two virtual DOM trees (old and new)
output_format: A list of patch operations to transform the old tree into the new tree
example_output: [{ type: 'REPLACE', node: newVNode }, { type: 'PROPS', props: changedProps }]
constraints: VNodes have type, props, and children. Children is an array of VNodes or strings.
function_signature: function diff(oldTree: VNode, newTree: VNode): Patch[] {}
